parameters.content:
## Sales Call AI Analyzer — Whisper + GPT-4o

For sales managers and revenue teams who want automatic AI analysis of every sales call without manual review. A sales rep submits a call recording link via a web form. The workflow downloads the audio, transcribes it using OpenAI Whisper, and sends the full transcript to a GPT-4o agent for deep analysis. Results include sentiment, objections, buying signals, deal risk, next steps, a coaching tip, and a ready-to-send follow-up email. Everything is saved to Airtable, posted to Slack, and shown to the rep as a rich results page.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Sales Rep Submits Call** collects rep details, prospect info, deal stage, and audio link
- **2. Code — Clean and Validate Form Data** normalizes inputs and creates a unique submission ID
- **3. HTTP — Download Audio File** downloads the audio from the provided URL
- **4. OpenAI — Transcribe with Whisper** sends the audio to Whisper and returns a full transcript
- **5. Code — Merge Transcript with Call Data** combines the transcript with all call metadata
- **6. AI Agent — GPT-4o Sales Analysis** analyses the transcript and returns structured JSON
- **8. Code — Parse and Combine AI Analysis** cleans and merges the GPT-4o response
- **9. Airtable — Save Full Analysis** saves the complete record to your Airtable base
- **10. Slack — Post Analysis to Channel** posts a summary alert to your sales Slack channel
- **11. Code — Build HTML Confirmation Page** builds the rep-facing results page
- **12. Webhook — Show Results Page to Rep** returns the HTML page directly to the rep

## Set up steps
1. In **4. OpenAI — Transcribe with Whisper** — replace YOUR_TOKEN_HERE with your OpenAI API key using an n8n Header Auth credential
2. In **7. OpenAI — Chat Model (GPT-4o)** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **9. Airtable — Save Full Analysis** — connect your Airtable credential and select your base and table
4. In **10. Slack — Post Analysis to Channel** — connect your Slack webhook credential
5. Activate the workflow and share the form URL with your sales team

## Form Intake
Sales rep submits call details and a direct audio link. Data is cleaned, validated, and assigned a unique submission ID.

## Audio Transcription
Audio file is downloaded from the submitted URL and sent to OpenAI Whisper. The full transcript is merged back with all call metadata.

## AI Analysis
GPT-4o analyses the transcript and returns structured JSON covering sentiment, objections, buying signals, deal risk, next steps, coaching tip, follow-up email, and a CRM note.

## Output and Delivery
Analysis is fanned out to Airtable for long-term records, Slack for team alerts, and an HTML results page shown directly to the rep in the browser.

## ⚠️ API Key Exposed in Plain Text
The OpenAI API key is hard-coded as a raw string in this node. Anyone with access to the workflow can read it. Replace YOUR_TOKEN_HERE by creating an n8n Header Auth credential and selecting it via the node credential picker. Never paste API keys directly into request headers.

values.placeholder: Paste a direct download link to the audio file (mp3, wav, m4a)
Optional — e.g. prospect mentioned budget cuts, competitor Salesforce

parameters.formDescription: Submit your sales call recording for automatic AI analysis. You will receive a Slack summary with insights, objections, and next steps.

nodes.name: 2. Code — Clean and Validate Form Data
5. Code — Merge Transcript with Call Data

parameters.text:
=You are an expert sales call analyst. You will receive a sales call transcript along with call metadata. Your job is to analyze the transcript deeply and return a single valid JSON object — nothing else. No explanation, no markdown, no code fences. Only raw JSON.

---

INPUT YOU WILL RECEIVE:
- repName: Name of the sales rep
- company: Prospect company name
- contactName: Prospect contact person
- dealStage: Current deal stage (e.g. Discovery, Demo, Proposal)
- dealValue: Estimated deal value in USD
- durationMins: Call duration in minutes
- repNotes: Any notes added by the rep before analysis
- transcript: Full text transcript of the sales call

---

YOUR JOB:
Carefully read the transcript and return this exact JSON structure:

{
  "summary": "A clear 3–5 sentence summary of what happened on this call. What was discussed, what the prospect said, and how the call ended.",

  "overall_sentiment": "Positive | Neutral | Negative",

  "sentiment_score": A number from 0 to 100. 0 = very negative, 100 = very positive.,

  "primary_intent": "One short phrase describing what the prospect mainly wants. Example: 'Evaluating alternatives to current tool' or 'Ready to buy pending legal approval'",

  "deal_risk": "Low | Medium | High",

  "deal_momentum": "Accelerating | Steady | Stalling | Declining",

  "recommended_stage": "The deal stage you recommend AFTER this call. Choose from: Prospecting, Discovery, Demo, Proposal, Negotiation, Closed Won, Closed Lost",

  "rep_talk_ratio": "Estimate of how much the rep talked vs the prospect. Example: '65% rep / 35% prospect'",

  "objections": [
    {
      "type": "Price | Timeline | Competition | Authority | Need | Other",
      "quote": "A short direct quote from the transcript showing this objection",
      "was_addressed": true or false
    }
  ],

  "buying_signals": [
    "List each buying signal as a short sentence. Example: 'Prospect asked about onboarding timeline' or 'Prospect mentioned they have budget approved'"
  ],

  "competitors_mentioned": [
    "List any competitor names mentioned on the call. Empty array if none."
  ],

  "next_steps": [
    {
      "action": "What needs to happen next",
      "owner": "rep | prospect | both",
      "commitment": "Was this committed to on the call? yes or no",
      "deadline": "Deadline if mentioned, otherwise null"
    }
  ],

  "coaching_tip": "One specific, actionable coaching tip for the rep based on this call. Be direct and helpful. Example: 'You spoke for 70% of the call — on the next call, ask more open-ended questions and let the prospect lead.'",

  "crm_note": "A 2–3 sentence CRM note ready to paste into a CRM. Professional tone. Include deal stage, key outcomes, and next steps.",

  "follow_up_email": "A ready-to-send follow-up email from the rep to the prospect. Include subject line at the top like 'Subject: ...'. Keep it professional, warm, and under 150 words. Reference something specific from the call."
}

---

STRICT RULES:
1. Output ONLY the JSON object above. No text before or after it.
2. Do not wrap in markdown code blocks or backticks.
3. If something is not mentioned in the transcript, use an empty array [] or null — do not guess or hallucinate.
4. Quotes in the "objections" field must come directly from the transcript.
5. The follow_up_email must feel personal — reference something the prospect actually said.
6. Keep all text in English unless the transcript is in another language.

nodes.name: 8. Code — Parse and Combine AI Analysis

parameters.jsCode:
// Build a clean confirmation page shown to the rep after form submit const d = $input.first().json; const a = d.analysis || {}; const nextStepsHtml = (a.next_steps || []).map((s, i) => `
  • ${s.action} — ${s.owner} (${s.commitment}${s.deadline ? ', by ' + s.deadline : ''})
    • ` ).join('') || '
  • None identified
    • '; const objHtml = (a.objections || []).map(o => `
  • ${o.type.toUpperCase()}: "${o.quote}" — Addressed: ${o.was_addressed ? '✅' : '❌'}
    • ` ).join('') || '
  • None detected
    • '; const html = `

    ✅ Call Analysis Complete

    Submission ID: ${d.submissionId}

    Company: ${d.company} | Contact: ${d.contactName}

    Deal Stage: ${d.dealStage} → ${a.recommended_stage || 'No change'}

    Summary

    ${a.summary || 'No summary generated.'}

    Sentiment: ${a.overall_sentiment} (${a.sentiment_score}/100)

    Intent: ${a.primary_intent} | Deal Risk: ${a.deal_risk} | Momentum: ${a.deal_momentum}

    Objections

      ${objHtml}

    Next Steps

      ${nextStepsHtml}

    Coaching Tip

    ${a.coaching_tip || 'N/A'}

    Suggested Follow-up Email

    ${a.follow_up_email || ''}

    Full analysis saved to Airtable. Slack notification sent to your sales team.

    `; return [{ json: { html, submissionId: d.submissionId } }];

nodes.name: 12. Webhook — Show Results Page to Rep
